claims.headline: Eases anxious tension
claims.notesSentence: Demonstrated anxiolytic effects across three independent mouse models of anxiety.

claims.headline: Sharpens memory
claims.notesSentence: Reviewed in pharmacology literature as a cognitive-enhancing pyrrolidone with positive effects on memory.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Aniracetam memory pharmacology review on PubMed
